exit_codes.0: no findings at selected fail threshold, or --fail-on none

recommended_commands.command: godot-export-doctor matrix <project> --expected-platform Android --expected-platform Web --format markdown --output export-matrix.md --fail-on warning

recommended_commands.purpose: Compare export presets with a baseline
recommended_commands.command: godot-export-doctor diff <project> --baseline reports/baseline-export-presets --format markdown --output export-diff.md --fail-on none

recommended_commands.purpose: Inspect an exported folder for development files
recommended_commands.command: godot-export-doctor inspect-folder build/android --format markdown --output exported-folder.md --fail-on none
